system.description: Purple Sapphire Mushroom: This unique mushroom only grows in the Purple Caverns. When crushed and formed into a pill using 14 other ingredients it can stave off the effect of any poison for one day. As long as one takes a Purple Sapphire Mushroom pill each day it continues to stave off the effects. Brew Rating: TN 7.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 2: Rules
system.effects: Staves off the effect of any poison for one day.
